academic_requirements.summary: Open-access bachelor's degree. Applicants need a secondary school leaving qualification valid for university admission; international applicants must undergo Ca' Foscari's preliminary evaluation through apply.unive.it.
academic_requirements.prior_degree_or_diploma: Secondary school leaving certificate eligible for university admission, or a European Baccalaureate/European Secondary School Leaving Certificate obtained from European Schools in Italy. International applicants must have completed at least 12 years of schooling.
academic_requirements.subject_requirements: No programme-specific subject prerequisites are published for admission beyond the general validity of the secondary qualification.
academic_requirements.gpa_or_country_requirements: The qualification must normally permit access to higher education in the country where it was awarded. Applicants with only 10-11 years of schooling must provide additional qualifications covering the 1-2 year gap.
academic_requirements.committee_or_pre_evaluation: For applicants with an international qualification, the Welcome Unit first verifies eligibility through a preliminary evaluation on apply.unive.it; when eligibility is confirmed, entry requirements and academic background are evaluated according to the general international-admissions process.

accepted_proofs: A recognised English certificate on Ca' Foscari's AICLU-based list, such as Cambridge FCE, Trinity ISE II, IELTS 5.5-6.5, TOEFL iBT 72-94, or PTE Academic 59-75
A CLA Ca' Foscari Level B2.2 linguistic certificate or certificate of attendance and advancement
A certificate from a university language school included in the recognised-certifications list
An approved exemption-category self-certification supported by the required evidence
exemption_rules: Completed higher education studies, or at least one year of college, in a country where English is the medium of instruction
Obtained a high-school diploma or university qualification from a study path taught entirely in English
Completed at least one full high-school exchange year at an institution where English was the language of instruction
Hold one of the listed Italian university language degrees with a three-year English language course
language_requirements.assessment_or_upload_stage: International applicants upload recognised proof or exemption evidence in the admission/enrolment process. The programme page states that Ca' Foscari does not run a programme-specific English test as part of the application procedure.
language_requirements.deadline: English B2 must be met at enrolment. If it is missing at enrolment, the programme assigns an English B2 OFA that must be fulfilled by 30 September 2027.

rounds.notes: [uncertain] The official EU/equivalent apply.unive.it article exposes the final deadline for bachelor's degrees without an entry test, but not the full round-by-round breakdown on the static page.

application_deadline_eu.enrolment_deadline: Standard enrolment window: 1 July 2026 to 30 September 2026. Additional window with 50 EUR late fee: 1 October 2026 to 30 October 2026.
application_deadline_eu.notes: The programme-specific enrolment page gives the enrolment windows; the international-applicant rounds page gives the final apply.unive.it deadline for bachelor's programmes without an entry test.

rounds.round_name: Non-EU visa admission rounds via apply.unive.it [uncertain]
rounds.notes: [uncertain] The static official page no longer shows the underlying round dates; it only states the current closure status.

application_deadline_non_eu.visa_or_pre_enrolment_deadline: After admission, start Universitaly pre-enrolment and the visa process as soon as possible.
application_deadline_non_eu.current_status: Closed for non-EU applicants requiring a study visa for the 2026/2027 academic year.
application_deadline_non_eu.notes: This programme is a bachelor's degree without an entry test, but international applicants requiring a visa still had to apply in the relevant apply.unive.it round before closure.

required_documents.document_name: Valid passport or, for European applicants, ID card
required_documents.notes: A renewal or first-request receipt is also accepted where stated.

required_documents.document_name: Valid residence permit or renewal/first-request receipt
required_documents.notes: Required for non-European applicants already residing in Italy or the Schengen Area.

required_documents.document_name: Mark sheet or transcript of at least the last year of secondary studies
required_documents.notes: If the applicant is still in the last year of school, a provisional mark sheet/transcript is still mandatory.

required_documents.document_name: Official English or Italian translations of entry documents
required_documents.notes: Required whenever the original documents are not in English or Italian.
This may be provisional at application stage if the final document is not yet available, but the final version must be uploaded before the end of the enrolment period.

required_documents.document_name: Statement of Comparability from CIMEA, or Declaration of Value, or ARDI Statement of Correspondence with CIMEA Statement of Verification
required_documents.notes: The general international-entry page explains that one of these qualification-recognition routes is needed later for completion of enrolment.

required_documents.document_name: English B2 certificate or exemption evidence
required_documents.notes: If missing at enrolment, the programme assigns an English B2 OFA instead of rejecting the student outright.

entry_exam_or_test.test_name: No admission test; English B2 is checked at enrolment and may generate an OFA if missing
entry_exam_or_test.applies_to: All applicants. International applicants still undergo preliminary evaluation through apply.unive.it.
entry_exam_or_test.dates: No programme-specific admission test. Enrolment runs 1 July 2026 to 30 September 2026, with an additional window from 1 October 2026 to 30 October 2026.
entry_exam_or_test.scoring_or_threshold: No ranking test is published. English B2 is required; if missing at enrolment, an English B2 OFA must be fulfilled by 30 September 2027.

source_quotes.quote: Bachelor's degree programmes - a.y. 2026/2027 ... Italian and Mediterranean Studies
Students must have attended school for at least 12 years
A minimum B2-level knowledge of English is required.
You can enrol from July 1st to September 30th 2026.

uncertainty_notes: The official EU/equivalent apply.unive.it article gives the final deadline for bachelor's degrees without an entry test, but it does not expose the full 2026/2027 round breakdown on the static page.
The official non-EU visa article only exposes the current status ('no longer possible to apply') and does not publish the historical round deadlines on the static page.
apply.unive.it marketing pages show programme-specific tuition figures that differ from the central 2026/2027 fees page, so only the official central fees link is retained.
